lines.en_lit: said to you: That the belt of the High Priest is not the belt of the common priest.
And to the one who said Aaron and then his sons, is it not written: “And you will gird them with belts,” said to you: That teaches us the belt of the High Priest is the belt of the common priest.
why do I “And he girded him with a belt,” “And he girded them”? Learn from it Aaron and then his sons. And can you find simultaneously? It is necessary only first
remove the High Priest Why do remove him? Why do remove him? as we stated above: Whether to Rabbi Yoḥanan, as per his or whether it is to Reish Lakish, as per his
This is is saying. Why did he withdraw from his house, It was taught Rabbi Yehuda ben Beteira says: lest his wife be found uncertainty a menstruating woman, and have relations with her
Is that to say we are dealing with wicked people? Rather, lest he have relations with his wife and she be found uncertainty a menstruating woman.

The Sages stated before Rav Ḥisda: In accordance with whose in accordance with Rabbi Akiva, who said: A menstruating woman renders the man who had with relations with her impure. As, if the Rabbis, Didn’t they say a menstruating woman does not render the man who had with relations with her impure.
Rav Ḥisda said to Even if you say Rabbis, the Rabbis disagree with Rabbi Akiva only long afterward, However, afterward, concede to
Rabbi Zeira said: Learn from it he had relations with a menstruating woman is unlike a menstruating woman immerse day

As, if you say that he had relations with a menstruating woman is like a menstruating woman when does he immerse? at night how can he perform service the next day? Isn’t he required sunset Rather, not conclude from it he had relations with a menstruating woman is unlike a menstruating woman
Rav Shimi from Neharde’a says: Even you say he had relations with a menstruating woman is like a menstruating woman we sequester him one hour just sunset

raises an objection all obligated in immersions, their immersion is during the day. a menstruating woman and a woman after childbirth, whose immersion is at night. a menstruating woman, yes, he had relations with a menstruating woman, no,
menstruating woman and everyone whose inclusion is derived
raises objection: one a seminal emission like contact with a creeping animal, one had relations with a menstruating woman is like impure a corpse. What, not immersion, No, their impurity.
their impurity? explicitly writes their This, impurity of seven written in his and that, impurity of seven written in his
